baseline.notes: Estimated as characters divided by 4. Input includes the 7-panel brief, relevant A-F details from the 6-panel brief, and CSV header inspection. Output includes baseline_plot.py plus baseline SVG/PDF/PNG render.

candidate.notes: Estimated as characters divided by 4. Input includes the 7-panel brief, relevant A-F details from the 6-panel brief, CSV header inspection, and figure-layout-defaults.md. Output includes candidate_plot.py plus candidate SVG/PDF/PNG render and transcript/token updates.

notes: R5.C Part 2 only: 7-panel figure. Existing case-6panel files were not edited.
